description_long: This is a standard Coca-Cola can, cylindrical in shape with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around its body, accented by dynamic white and gold swooshes. Small water droplets are visible on the surface, suggesting condensation and a cold beverage inside. The top is metallic silver with a pull-tab opening mechanism, and the back features nutritional information and branding details in white text. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing its metallic construction. The overall appearance is clean, undamaged, and typical of a commercial soft drink container.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, metallic top, and condensation droplets, featuring detailed labeling and a pull-tab opening.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola script logo and dynamic swooshes on a red background.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, still highlighting the Coca-Cola logo and more of the can's curvature and condensation.
description_view_2: Side view revealing the transition from logo to the nutritional and branding information panel.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by nutritional facts, barcode, and smaller Coca-Cola branding elements.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white Coca-Cola script logo on red background, white and gold swooshes, nutritional facts and barcode in white text on the back, all in a clean, commercial style.
